content: No direct prior art found for SAM2 applied to thread/wire diameter measurement specifically. Biomedical SAM2 applications (BioSAM-2, MedSAM2, SAM4MIS) exist for organ/lesion/cell segmentation and microscopy, and general fiber-diameter literature uses U-Net/deep-learning distance-map approaches (not SAM2), not linear-object diameter measurement via SAM. This is a gap the project fills; no off-the-shelf SAM2-for-fiber-diameter tool exists.
